name: bryant24hao--agent-skill-publisher
description: End-to-end workflow for publishing agent skills to GitHub, ClawdHub, and skills.sh. Handles repo creation, topic tagging, ClawdHub publish, skills.sh index request, and installation verification. Use when: "publish skill", "上架 skill", "发布技能", "submit to skills.sh", "submit to clawhub", "skill 上架流程".
